response.original_title: Beyond Blue Sky: The Untold Story of the First Private Astronauts
response.overview: A supersonic physics experiment that would either end in a funeral or aerospace immortality for the desert-dwelling, corner-cutting geniuses, who wanted to prove it was possible to have a low-cost, privately-financed, manned space program.
response.tagline: The Untold Story of the First Private Astronauts
response.title: Beyond Blue Sky: The Untold Story of the First Private Astronauts
